entities.description: stress ng is a software tool used to run stress tests on the system s cpu and memory resources
arm cortex a76 is a type of processor core used in the system under test
arm cortex a55 is another type of processor core used in the system under test
100  represents the resource utilization level of the system s cpu and memory during the stress test

relations.description: stress ng is a software tool that stresses the arm cortex a76 processor cores during testing
stress ng is a software tool that stresses the arm cortex a55 processor cores during testing
stress ng causes the resource utilization to reach 100  on the system s cpu and memory
